# PERF-156 positive: ranging over a string with only the index used
lang: go
file: PERF-156-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "fmt"

func ByteLengths(strs []string) []int {
	out := make([]int, 0, len(strs))
	for i, _ := range strs {
		out = append(out, i)
	}
	return out
}

func _() {
	fmt.Println(ByteLengths([]string{"a", "bb", "ccc"}))
}
